evals.description: No vault path and no password. The setup must create a private eval vault, generate credentials, register a public managed service, and verify login redirect behavior.
assertions: Service URL is present and starts with https://
Service URL verification reaches the login page or login redirect

evals.description: No public vault path and no password. The setup must create a fresh public-readonly eval vault instead of scanning personal vaults, register a public managed service, and verify unauthenticated load behavior.
assertions: Service URL is present and starts with https://
Service URL verification loads without login

evals.description: Explicit eval fixture vault and generated password. The setup must use the provided fixture path, not create the default private vault as the active VAULT_PATH, register a public managed service, and verify login redirect behavior.
assertions: Service URL is present and starts with https://
Service URL verification reaches the login page or login redirect
